abuse_cases.case: all nodes blocked, no clear root
abuse_cases.expected_behavior: Root cause: Unknown; observed blockers listed separately; no node falsely promoted to root cause
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: describeRootCause returns system_id=null + taxonomy=unknown when every failure-path node has upstream blockers also on the path

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: Root cause: Unknown; UI marks not-artifact-backed
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: root_cause.artifact_backed=false flips the UI to '(not artifact-backed)' annotation

abuse_cases.expected_behavior: First is selected as primary; downstream_impact lists the rest
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: rootCandidates[0] is the primary root cause (deterministic by failure-path order); other failure-path nodes flow into downstream_impact

abuse_cases.case: stale priority artifact causing recommendation block
abuse_cases.expected_behavior: explain notes call out the stale state distinctly from root cause
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: notes adds 'priority artifact stale: top-3 fix targets reflect last-known ranking only' when priority.state === 'stale'

abuse_cases.case: missing eval and missing artifact both present
abuse_cases.expected_behavior: Taxonomy table picks the first matching taxonomy in declared order
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: FAILURE_TAXONOMY_TABLE order: missing_artifact precedes missing_eval, so missing_artifact wins on tie. Test 'maps missing_artifact signal to missing_artifact taxonomy' confirms.

abuse_cases.case: downstream SEL blocked but upstream EVL is the cause
abuse_cases.expected_behavior: Root cause = EVL; downstream_impact contains SEL
abuse_cases.actual_behavior: describeRootCause walks failure_path and selects the upstream-most node with no upstream blocker on the same path; downstreamImpactFromGraph returns the rest
